title: A. O. Smith's (AOS) Q2 Earnings Beat, Revenues Miss Mark
text: A. O. Smith's (AOS) Q2 results benefit from higher sales in North America and India. However, the company reduces sales forecast for 2022 due to lower volumes in water heating business.

title: A. O. Smith Corporation (AOS) CEO Kevin Wheeler on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE:AOS ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 28, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Helen Gurholt - Vice President, Financial Planning and Analysis Kevin Wheeler - Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer Chuck Lauber - Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Mike Halloran - Baird Nathan Jones - Stifel Andy Kaplowitz - Citigroup Matt Summerville - D.A. Davidson David MacGregor - Longbow Research Jeff Hammond - KeyBanc Capital Markets, Inc. Scott Graham - Loop Capital Markets Damian Karas - UBS Operator Good day and thank you for standing by.

title: Will Cost Headwinds Dampen A.O. Smith's (AOS) Q2 Earnings?
text: While an impressive performance in the North America segment is expected to have aided A.O. Smith's (AOS) Q2 performance, high costs might have impeded its bottom line.

title: Why A.O. Smith (AOS) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again
text: A.O. Smith (AOS) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: A. O. Smith: A Dividend Aristocrat On Sale
text: I think the recent financial performance has been quite good, in spite of the slight deterioration of the balance sheet. The dividend remains very well covered in my view. In spite of this, the shares are trading near the bottom end of their range, which puts the yield near the top of its historical range.

title: AZZ Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates and Revenues Increase Y/Y
text: AZZ's fiscal first-quarter 2023 earnings beat estimates. AZZ gains from improved segment results and anticipates strong performance in the fiscal second quarter.

title: A. O. Smith: Recent Correction Is A Buying Opportunity
text: Investors are worried about the impact of the Chinese lockdown and supply chain woes on Q2 22 results. However, these are just short-term disruptions, and revenues and margins should improve in 2H FY22.

title: 4 Stocks Set to Gain on Solid Jump in Factory Orders
text: Factory orders have been growing steadily, helping manufacturing stocks like The LGL Group, Inc. (LGL), A. O. Smith Corporation (AOS), DXP Enterprises, Inc. (DXPE) and Nordson Corporation (NDSN).

title: Here's Why You Should Give A. O. Smith (AOS) a Shot Now
text: A. O. Smith (AOS) benefits from robust demand for its products across North America. The company's expansion initiatives are expected to bolster its top line.

title: Three Cheap Stocks That Just Got Upgraded
text: Now that the S&P 500 (NYSEARCA: SPY) has corrected about 20% the stock market is starting to look cheap again. While we think the broad market still has a ways to go before hitting bottom there are some stocks and sectors garnering attention from the analyst.

title: A.O. Smith: An Undervalued Dividend Aristocrat
text: Investors looking for high-quality companies with safe and reliable dividends may want to consider the Dividend Aristocrat index. This select group of companies within the S&P 500 Index has raised dividends for a minimum of 25 consecutive years.

title: A. O. Smith to Hold Second Quarter Conference Call on July 28, 2022
text: MILWAUKEE , July 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE: AOS) will release its second quarter 2022 financial results before the market opens on Thursday, July 28, and has scheduled an investor conference call to follow at 10:00 a.m.
